SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-06-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Gregory Brod, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Robin Scholle et al.
Philip A. Segal, Esq. for Defendants: Royal Taxi, Inc. et al.
Plaintiff's Witness Jeffrey Bond was placed under oath and direct examined.
Cousel stated that matter had settled with JPT this morning and was sent to put settlement on the record. Parties stated that no settlement on the record is necessary, no witnesses present.
Case is deemed settled and Trial date vacated.
Matter is place on the CRC dismissal calendar on 11-06-12 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610
